title: AH Buy Price Tracker
description: Tracks Hypixel SkyBlock Auction House purchases and permanently adds the buy price and timestamp to item tooltips.
body:
**AH Buy Price Tracker (Fabric 1.21.10 / 1.21.11)**

A lightweight client-side Fabric mod for Hypixel SkyBlock that automatically tracks the price and purchase time of items bought from the Auction House and permanently displays this information in the item tooltip.

**Features**
- Automatically detects Auction House purchases via chat.
- Assigns the correct price and timestamp to the exact bought item.
- Uses Hypixel item data (ExtraAttributes.uuid, id, or NBT fingerprint).
- Works even when items do not have a UUID.
- Stores data locally in config/ahprice.json.

**How It Works**
- Detects the message:
- You purchased ... for ... coins!
- Tracks inventory changes for a short time window
- Identifies the exact item using:
- UUID (best case)
- Hypixel item ID
- NBT fingerprint fallback
- Saves purchase data locally and re-applies it to the tooltip permanently

**Requirements**
- Minecraft 1.21.10
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API
- Java 21


**Notes**
- This is a client-side only mod.
- Does not modify server data.
- Works only for items purchased while the mod is installed.
- If an item has no UUID, a fallback system ensures tracking still works.

Saved purchase data:
.minecraft/config/ahprice.json
